sql_array: CREATE TABLE hudi_test (id UInt32, name String) ENGINE = Hudi('url', 'table_format', 'column1_name UInt32, column2_name String');
UPDATE hudi_test SET name = 'Bob' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT * FROM arguments('s3://mybucket/hudi_table', 'my_access_key', 'my_secret_key', 'CSV', 'column_id UInt32, column_name String');
